
## Cookies and logins {visibility="hidden"}

### last time: web security  {.smaller}


* <em>stateless</em> requests (single URL)
* added <em>cookies</em> to tie requests together 

   * ‘‘session ID’’ --- identifies, e.g., login

* client versus server trust 

   * don't trust <em>the attacker's browser</em>

* XSS --- command injection in HTML 

   * power of scripting --- get cookies
   * doesn't need to be stored --- embed in other web page
   * extract info to external site --- e.g., fetch image



### evil client/innocent website 

![](/web/texfig/web2-evil-clientinnocent-website.figure.svg)


### XSS demo 



# web pages in web pages {visibility="hidden"}

# Clickjacking {visibility="hidden"}

# Deliberate Sharing {visibility="hidden"}

### againframe(noSameOrigin)

### demo
